team.name: Jack Carlsen
team.desc: Jack is fishing in the pond as you read this, catching another story to tell. He loves directing for the screen, and is the brains behind many of the projects you see here. Graduating from Loyola Marymount University's Film. Production program, he works hands on with production equipment and programs, as well as collaborates with talented teams to see projects through.

team.name: Karina Salerno
team.desc: Karina's the one who makes sure our productions go swimmingly, and that all our ducks are in a row. She's organizing people, locations, equipment, and so much more. If you can't find her she's probably nesting among a boatload of spreadsheets, stretching the last of our budget to the limits.
